headline: Is Prologis, Inc. (PLD) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is PLD a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Prologis, Inc. on r/ValueInvesting by ermiasbraki. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on PLD. Prologis, Inc.’s share was trading at $142.78 as of June 8th. PLD’s trailing and forward P/E were 36.32 and 33.78 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Prologis, […]
